reason: The SSH daemon should prevent remote hosts from connecting to the proxy display. The default SSH configuration for X11UseLocalhost is yes, which prevents remote hosts from connecting to the proxy display. To explicitly prevent remote connections to the proxy display, add or correct the following line in /etc/ssh/sshd_config.d/00-complianceascode-hardening.conf: X11UseLocalhost yes.
estimated_impact: authentication/authorization affected; networking affected; SSH misconfiguration; Unauthorized remote access; Proxy exposure
